name: Employee Directory
query: SELECT id, name, email, designation, status, join_date FROM employees ORDER BY join_date DESC

name: Inventory & Stock Levels
query: SELECT id, item_name, item_code, stock_level, price, supplier FROM inventory ORDER BY stock_level ASC

name: System Operations Log
query: SELECT id, user_role, action_type, details, created_at FROM system_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
